title: euphorbia peplus var. minima
intro: Euphorbia peplus var. minima, also known as the least spurge or minute spurge, is a perennial plant belonging to the Euphorbiaceae family. This plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects, which are attributed to the presence of ingenol mebutate. The health benefits of Euphorbia peplus var. minima include its potential to treat skin conditions such as warts, acne, and eczema, as well as its ability to reduce pain and inflammation. In herbal preparations, the plant is often made into a topical ointment or salve, and it can also be consumed as a tincture or infused oil to harness its medicinal properties.
